response.justification: Bogdan is a versatile, hands-on senior engineer with nearly two decades of full-stack and systems experience, but the profile does not meet the core executive requirements of this role. There is no evidence of senior technical leadership, scaling an engineering organization from 10 to 30+ people, or building and operating production multi-agent AI systems. Fintech exposure is limited to about a year at RIDE Capital and pricing work at Optilyz, and AI-agent experience is recent tooling contribution rather than architecting stateful agentic platforms in regulated, high-stakes environments. Strong IC, wrong altitude for a CTO mandate.
strengths: Deep, polyglot engineering breadth including low-latency, high-throughput microservices work at Sociomantic (millions of requests/sec)
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Founder experience (GISCollective) plus strong craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, open-source, teaching and workshops
concerns: No executive or engineering-management track record; career is almost entirely senior/staff IC roles with no team-scaling evidence
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems, LLM evaluation infrastructure, or model-agnostic agent architecture ownership
Thin fintech and regulated-environment experience relative to credit-risk, compliance, and working-capital requirements

key_factors.factor: Lack of engineering leadership and org-scaling experience
No production multi-agent AI systems experience
Strong distributed-systems and backend engineering depth
